title: Sanji Is Trapped by the Wedding
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Pedro, Nami, Big Mom, Big Mom Pirates as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While we sit here and wait, daydreaming for some person to come magically save us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything will be over before we know it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After that, big mom is gonna come and kill us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a joke! That's totally not how I'd like to meet my end!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You rip your hands off too, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fuck is wrong with you?! Hell no!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'll figure out your situation after I'm done!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Quit making a huge fuss!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want to see your hands getting ripped off either, you fucking twat! Stop that this instant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: 3. The following are the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Quit complain- >ing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm not a man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: kyaaah!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...who's gonna end in a place like this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The 3rd floor courtyard.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ex-captain of the Nox Pirates PEDRO Bounty: 300,000,200%

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Knight" and fighter of the big mom pirates BARON TAMAGO Bounty: 400,00,900.#

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pekoms... is it true that you're affiliated with the big mom pirates?

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: pedro... Zepo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This time, you're not getting away with losing just an eye!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You've really done it now, thief!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Your friend over here spun the roulette...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and landed the "100 years of life" option for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ZePoo O...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This fella over here only had 30 years left, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come, hand over the remaining 70 years from your life!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ZePo 000!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're incapable of reaching nearly as far as I can-bon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: on top of that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gao! Mama, he's like a brother to me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am wearing tights that prevent electro from working on my body!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit sobbing like a baby, pekoms! Fine, I'll round it down a decade.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm still furious at you for rubbing tamago of an eye, though... so fess up 60 years, kid!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 33 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
